judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After computing EMA results and getting a NaN title from the CPC title join, the agent’s subsequent execute_python calls referenced an undefined 'nan' constant (NameError) and it ultimately returned an error message instead of the required output, as shown by the repeated NameError in the trace before the return_answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step (call_lxpyrL65i2m4mV5pfAIyKDMx), the agent filtered German patents using an is_germany() regex that only matches "from DE" or "DE-" in Patents_info, missing records phrased like "In DE," and thereby excluded valid H2 2019 German grants, resulting in an empty output despite relevant data (from var_call_WsAjyPFt4M2aLOCM9DMAioYs and var_call_bW30R6oKqU6GU3BFQD2k1hnD) being available.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python step (call_IVrop28g4upplnofQkBPHuH7), the agent incorrectly derived “level 4” CPC groups by parsing subclass/main-group codes like “B23K1” instead of class-level symbols like “B23” used in cpc_definition (call_ctQJ2KMH8FuxLNtw8rdlkRMb), then mapped titles by prefix and arbitrarily truncated to top 20, resulting in codes and best years that do not match the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s execute_python step filtered for Germany by parsing "Patents_info" for phrases like "from DE" or "In DE" instead of identifying the DE grant jurisdiction (e.g., via the publication number), which mis-selected the country and yielded no DE patents in H2 2019, leading to an empty result.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python, the agent filtered for Germany by extracting a country code from Patents_info using brittle regex patterns like "In ([A-Z]{2})" or "([A-Z]{2}) patent" (instead of parsing the 'country_code' token), which failed to detect DE records and resulted in an empty dataset and "No results found."
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
